name: miggo-mcp
description: MCP server for Miggo's public API - query services, endpoints, vulnerabilities, findings, dependencies, and third-party integrations
long_description: Connect Claude to your Miggo security environment. This extension provides 25 tools to explore and analyze your application security posture including services, endpoints, vulnerabilities, findings, dependencies, and third-party integrations. Use natural language to assess risk, investigate threats, onboard security teams, and prioritize remediation across your entire environment.

tools.name: services_search
tools.description: Search for services in your Miggo environment — use to inventory running microservices, find services by name or technology, or scope a risk review

tools.name: services_get
tools.description: Fetch a single service by ID — use to drill into a specific service's details, dependencies, and risk score

tools.name: services_count
tools.description: Count services matching filters — use for quick summaries like 'how many Java services do we run?'

tools.name: services_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for service filters — use to discover available filter options before searching

tools.name: endpoints_search
tools.description: Search for API endpoints across your environment — use to find internet-facing routes, specific URL patterns, or endpoints by HTTP method

tools.name: endpoints_get
tools.description: Fetch a single endpoint by ID — use to inspect an endpoint's owning service, exposure level, and associated findings

tools.name: endpoints_count
tools.description: Count endpoints matching filters — use for questions like 'how many public endpoints do we expose?'

tools.name: endpoints_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for endpoint filters — use to discover available HTTP methods, services, or exposure types

tools.name: third_parties_search
tools.description: Search for third-party integrations your services communicate with — use to audit external dependencies and data flows

tools.name: third_parties_get
tools.description: Fetch a single third-party integration by ID — use to review what services connect to a specific external provider

tools.name: third_parties_count
tools.description: Count third-party integrations matching filters — use to answer 'how many external services do we depend on?'

tools.name: third_parties_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for third-party filters — use to discover known providers and integration types

tools.name: findings_search
tools.description: Search security findings including posture issues, configuration drift, and incidents — use for risk assessments and compliance reviews

tools.name: findings_get
tools.description: Fetch a single finding by ID — use to get full details on a specific security issue including affected services and remediation context

tools.name: findings_count
tools.description: Count findings matching filters — use for executive summaries like 'how many critical findings are open?'

tools.name: findings_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for finding filters — use to see available severity levels, finding types, and statuses

tools.name: vulnerabilities_search
tools.description: Search known vulnerabilities (CVEs) across your services — use to check exposure to specific CVEs or prioritize patching by severity

tools.name: vulnerabilities_get
tools.description: Fetch a single vulnerability by ID — use to see which services and dependencies are affected by a specific CVE

tools.name: vulnerabilities_count
tools.description: Count vulnerabilities matching filters — use to answer 'how many critical unpatched CVEs do we have?'

tools.name: vulnerabilities_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for vulnerability filters — use to discover severity levels, statuses, and affected packages

tools.name: dependencies_search
tools.description: Search software dependencies across your services — use for supply-chain audits, license reviews, or finding which services use a specific package

tools.name: dependencies_get
tools.description: Fetch a single dependency by ID — use to inspect a package's version, vulnerabilities, and which services depend on it

tools.name: dependencies_count
tools.description: Count dependencies matching filters — use to answer 'how many vulnerable dependencies do we have?'

tools.name: dependencies_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for dependency filters — use to discover package ecosystems, vulnerability statuses, and versions in use

tools.name: project_get
tools.description: Get metadata for the authenticated project — use to confirm which Miggo environment you're connected to and see project-level settings
